label: agentdb • conditional UPDATE then report the affected count
query: Your agent database has a table tasks(id INTEGER, status TEXT). In a single UPDATE statement, change every row whose status is 'open' to 'archived'. Then tell me how many tasks are now archived.
notes: Write-then-report: a WHERE-scoped UPDATE must touch only the 'open' rows. dbState pins the post-run table (3 archived, 0 open) so a too-broad update (archiving the 'done' rows) or a no-op fails; finalTextContains pins the reported count. The mutation surface is the model's choice (db_execute UPDATE or the typed db_update both express one WHERE-scoped statement); toolUsageAudit caps per-surface calls so a row-at-a-time loop still fails the 'single statement' contract.

seedSql: CREATE TABLE tasks (id INTEGER, status TEXT); INSERT INTO tasks (id, status) VALUES (1,'open'),(2,'open'),(3,'open'),(4,'done'),(5,'done');

dbState.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE status='archived'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE status='open'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE status='done'
